claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Cody is an AI coding assistant that uses all the latest LLMs and your development context to help you understand, write, and fix code faster.

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: "Sourcegraph pricing" is listed as a link on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: Sourcegraph allows developers to rapidly search, write, and understand code by bringing insights from their entire codebase right into the editor.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Cody is available on VS Code, JetBrains, Visual Studio, and the Web app.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Cody collects and uses data in the following ways: Prompts and responses: When you use Cody, Sourcegraph collects your prompts and responses to provide the service.
